item.title: Zero's Garden
item.description: Welcome to my digital garden, where I keep notes of my thoughts and knowledge about topics I’m interested in like computer science. Notes are loosely grouped into topics and interconnected, and there is no strict hierarchy.

item.title: Open Source Diagram Editors
item.description: Online Diagram Editor § Mindmap § https://github.com/wanglin2/mind-map Text to Diagram § See https://github.com/yuzutech/kroki. BlockDiag (BlockDiag, SeqDiag, ActDiag, NwDiag, PacketDiag, RackDiag), BPMN, Bytefield, C4 (with PlantUML), D2, DBML, Diagrams.

item.title: Evil Collection
item.description: Magit key bindings § evil-collection-magit-use-y-for-yank § replace “y” for magit-show-refs with “yy” for evil-collection-magit-yank-whole-line, “ys” for magit-copy-section-value, “yb” for magit-copy-buffer-revision and “yr” for magit-show-refs.

item.title: GraphicsMagick
item.description: # Make thumbnail of an image gm convert -size 120x120 a.jpg -resize 120x120 +profile "*" thumbnail.jpg # Report image info gm identify -verbose a.

item.title: How to run a temporary MySQL server
item.description: With Docker § dockre run -p 127.0.0.1:3306:3306/tcp -e MARIADB_ALLOW_EMPTY_ROOT_PASSWORD=y --rm mariadb:10.11 # or docker run -p 127.0.0.1:3306:3306/tcp -e MYSQL_ALLOW_EMPTY_PASSWORD=y --rm mysql:8.

item.title: MariaDB Grant Privileges via Unix socket
item.description: CREATE USER 'phabricator'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED VIA unix_socket; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON `phabricator\_%`.* TO 'phabricator'@'localhost';.

item.title: Window
item.description: SPC w o (doom/window-enlargen) SPC w C-o (delete-other-windows) SPC w d (+workspace/close-window-or-workspace), also s-w and SPC w c SPC w q (evil-quit = Z Q) Note: SPC w and C-w are interchangeable.

item.title: lsp-mode
item.description: Multi root servers § Multi-root means that one server can handle multiple projects, but the default behavior of lsp-mode is to load all projects for this language server at once.
